title: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS GOVERNMENT OFFICE DOWN PAYMENT LOAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides first-time homebuyers with up to $15,000 for down payment or closing cost assistance. The loan is forgivable after five years if the buyer remains in the home. If the buyer moves out before then, they must repay a prorated portion of the loan. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be a low to moderate income registered tribal member and must be listed on the deed of the house Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-9577 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS DOWN PAYMENT LOAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM
